title.en: They still didn't want to give up the Primordia...

content.en:
For a long time, the legendary body of the ice phoenix shown by Soho was only in the Dacheng realm, but its strength was also almost invincible to the legendary Dao realm.

But now, Soho has shown the legendary body of the ice phoenix in the realm of perfection, which is truly invincible!

You must know that Soho's Ice Phoenix Legend Body is the body of the strongest legend, and she is also taking the road of the strongest and most powerful, so you can imagine how terrifying the strength is.

The strength displayed by Soho not only suppressed several other Legendary Dao Realms, but also those Legendary Dao Void Demons.

"Chase!"

They still didn't want to give up the Primordial Black Lotus.

If it is really obtained by Soho and makes Soho a legendary Dao realm, then it is not an ordinary elder, but a top veteran-level strength.

Therefore, the Void Demon side of the Supreme Dao is unwilling to give up.

......

But.

Soho's strength was still strong enough to get rid of these invincible legendary Dao Void Demons, and then quickly came out of the sea of fog.

Her purpose has been achieved, and there is no need to stay in the sea of fog.

As soon as Soho came out, the Su Yuan patriarch of the Su clan came.

"Ancestor, I have obtained the Primordial Black Lotus!"

Soho said.

"Okay!" Su Yuan was very excited, "With the primordial black lotus, coupled with the heritage of our Su clan, it is enough to increase your chance of breaking through to seventy percent!"

The Mo Immortal Elder on the side said enviously: "Su Yuan, congratulations to you Su Clan, this time is not a small opportunity!"

"It's just luck!"

Su Yuan said.

Subsequently, Su Yuan took Soho back to Su Yu.

Sea of fog.

Ye Tian was still here to collect resources and find the Supreme Dao Void Demon Killing, but he also received the news.

"The resource in the sea of fog that helps break through to the veteran level turned out to be the primordial black lotus, and it was also obtained by Soho!"

Ye Tian was surprised.

In other words, if Soho breaks through to the veteran level, will he still be able to guard the Winter Night Fortress in the future?

"Even if Soho doesn't go to guard the Winter Night Fortress, he should send a top legend to the Dao realm to guard it, after all, I have an agreement with the Sioux people!" Ye Tian thought to himself.

Since the primordial black lotus was snatched away, those top legends to the Dao realm also left one by one.

Their purpose is the Primordial Black Lotus, and as for the other resources that are not of much help to them, they naturally can't look down on them.

But there are also legends left in the Dao Realm, ready to kill more Dao Void Demons, or find more resources for the sake of future generations.

Time flies.

Time passed slowly, and Ye Tian's harvest was getting more and more, and he was in a good mood.

But this day.

He received a notice that the Sea of Fog wanted to stay away from the Void Domain, and even the Mo Immortal Elders couldn't stop it, so they had to come out as soon as possible.

"Get out!"

Ye Tian's body turned into a streamer of light to impact the void barrier above the Sea of Mist.

It's not difficult to get out of the sea of fog, it's just hard to get in.

Rumble!!!!!

The barrier of the Sea of Fog was broken, Ye Tian came to the outside world, and then was led by the Mo Immortal Elder and landed in the Mohe Fortress.

Airplanes!

The Ten Thousand Mirror sigil was recovered.

Then, Ye Tian waited silently.

"An elder position should be no problem!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Soon, all the Supreme Dao realms came out.

"Three hundred Supreme Dao Realm have fallen!"

When this data was released, it was very shocking.

But when I think about it, I think it's normal.

Perhaps in the eyes of the other deacons, the Innate Origin Domain Alliance suffered heavy losses this time.

However, this loss is nothing at all.

Without him, the Innate Origin Domain Alliance has no shortage of Ninefold Dao Realm and Deacons, if one more Patriarch can be born, even if a hundred Legends to the Dao Realm are fallen, it is worth it.

And this time, most of the fallen ones were in the Ninefold Dao Realm, and this loss was even more insignificant.

Subsequently.

Elder Mo Immortal began to announce the six elder candidates this time.

【Moron】

【Su Ji】

【Ye Tian】

【Sword Cliff】

【Xu Lin】

【Togen】

These six names were announced, causing exclamations from many deacons.

The other five are just that, they are all relatively powerful Legends to the Dao Realm, but in the past, there were no places for elders, so they did not become elders, and they actually all had elder-level strength.

And what about Ye Tian, the Nine Levels to the Dao Realm, even if the combat power is very strong, it is stronger than many legendary Dao realms, but in the sea of fog, the Supreme Dao rules cannot be used, no matter how high Ye Tian's Supreme Dao rules realm is, it is useless, how can he kill so many Supreme Dao Void Demons?

They were very puzzled, but there was definitely no problem with this place, and Elder Mo Xian would not deliberately choose Ye Tian.

In this way, Ye Tian obtained the position of an elder of the Innate Origin Domain Alliance.

......

After Ye Tian became an elder of the Innate Origin Domain Alliance, he knew how precious the number of elders was.

First of all.

Elders can buy a lot of resources and treasures, which the deacons can't buy.

Moreover, the elders could obtain all the cultivation inheritance knowledge of the Legend to the Dao Realm, and he exchanged this inheritance knowledge for the first time.

In addition to this, the Elders also have a Legendary-level Supreme Weapon reward.

He didn't have a Legendary-level Dao weapon before.

Winter Night's Fortress.

A Legendary-level Dao puppet sent Ye Tian's Elder Reward.

A legendary-level supreme weapon suit, with extremely strong defense, and a golden feather liquid, which is much more precious than the elixir supreme liquid.

A golden feather liquid can improve the cultivation of the legendary Dao.

Of course.

If it is refined to the Nine Folds Dao Realm, it is also feasible, but it is a bit wasteful.

"Waste is waste, I have to be promoted to the peak cultivation of the Ninth Rank Dao Realm as soon as possible, as for those useless Qiong Paste to Dao Gold Liquid, leave it to my son!"

Ye Tian was ready to refine this piece of elixir golden feather liquid.

Rumble!!!

The energy of the golden feather liquid swept through Ye Tian's body, quickly improving his cultivation.

"The effect of the golden feather liquid is too awesome, compared with the golden feather liquid of the agar to the golden feather liquid, it is scum!"

However, the energy of the golden feather liquid is too terrifying, and the general Ninefold Dao Realm cannot be refined, and it will be exploded directly, and only the Ninefold Dao Realm that has taken the path of the strongest Dao is qualified to refine.

After all, in terms of physical fitness, he himself is no less than the legendary Dao realm, so he dares to refine the golden feather liquid.

One era after another has passed.

About 500 to the end of the Dao era.

Rumble!!!!!

Ye Tian's cultivation broke through and reached the peak realm of the Ninefold Dao Realm.

This breakthrough was too easy!

But if he couldn't become an elder, he wouldn't be able to obtain the Golden Feather Liquid.

"I wonder if there is a chance to get a large amount of Agar Golden Feather Liquid?"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Now.

After the breakthrough of cultivation, he was ready to attack the Legend to the Dao Realm.

According to the inheritance knowledge of the Legendary Dao Realm, he now has a good understanding of how to impact the Legendary Dao Realm.

For a long time, he thought that the secret method of the Legendary Body was learned, but he didn't expect that it came from the blood of the strongest legend, and any kind of legendary blood contained the cultivation method of the legendary body corresponding to the body of legend.

Therefore, he needed to refine the blood of the strongest legend, and then impact the legend to the Dao realm.
